finding_results.notes: Reworked the cited Ren-POV beats so Jet, Faye, and Spike are read through visible cues, tone, and Ren's marked guesses rather than narrator-certainty. Also cleaned adjacent overlay lines in the same scene to keep the camera consistently behind Ren's eyes.

Collapsed the parking spot, Takara bounty, old ping, and market contact into one confrontation where Ren explains the bait as a single delivery mechanism, adds the cost of six months and prepaid berth money, and turns the scene back toward Jet's partner instead of auditing clues one by one.

summary: Addressed the close-third POV overlay in Ren's scene and rebuilt the late reveal so the bait logic lands as one escalating exchange instead of a checklist recap.
